name: aec-scholar
description: An end-to-end academic research toolkit for Architecture, Engineering & Construction. Covers the full research lifecycle: scoping and systematic literature reviews (PRISMA 2020), bibliometric/scientometric analysis, research-question and methodology design, data analysis planning, scholarly writing (IMRaD), citation management, journal targeting, peer review and rebuttal — backed by deep, current AEC domain knowledge (BIM, building performance, construction management, computational design, sustainability/LCA, digital twins, AI-in-AEC and more).
